name: empty entity_ref dropped; emoji name, weird kind, and huge statement persist
description: Adversarial degenerate-field probe combining four hostile inputs in one note. (1) A fact with a WHITESPACE-ONLY entity_ref is dropped by extraction.parse_extraction (entity_ref.strip() is falsy -> 'invalid fields'), so it never reaches the graph and cannot crash _upsert_fact. (2) A mention with a weird snake_case 'kind' ('ancient_deity_idol') is stored verbatim — kind is a free string, not an enum, so the entity is minted with that kind. (3) An entity name with emoji + combining unicode resolves through normalize_alias (NFKD) without error and is created. (4) An EXTREMELY long statement (~9 KB) is stored unbounded — extraction.parse_extraction applies NO length guard, DOCUMENTING the unbounded-statement gap (same family as H1). Pins that all of these are handled deterministically and none crash: the emoji entity exists, the long-statement fact persists active, and the whitespace-entity_ref fact is absent.

steps.body: Notes about Glob the storyteller and a stray fact with no subject.
